# tests/fixtures/vaults — authored worked-stone test vaults

`.des`-format vaults authored by the project to PROVE the assembler (Master Directive
P2–P4). Per the operator ruling (June 12 2026): **no GPL DCSS files enter the repo at
all** — these are all original, so there is no licensing fence to enforce and no leak
risk. The assembler is what P4 proves, not the rooms; shippable vault packs are authored
only after a passing floor reads right to the operator's eye.
